nasb.text: He who loves purity of heart And whose speech is gracious, the king is his friend.

esv.text: He who loves purity of heart, and whose speech is gracious, will have the king as his friend.

cnv.text: 喜愛內心潔淨，嘴上有恩言的， 君王要作他的朋友。

ccb.text: 喜爱清心、口吐恩言的人， 必与君王为友。

csbs.text: 喜爱内心纯净的，他的嘴上有恩言， 有君王与他做朋友。
